tasks.name: Wire Ground Truth Logger into CLI
tasks.description: Create GroundTruthLogger in _async_run() and pass to DataEngine. Add --ground-truth-path CLI arg. Call write_header() after construction. Ensure close() in finally block. Test batch mode produces JSONL with header + scenario events.

tasks.name: Fix Ground Truth Header — Add Missing Scenarios
tasks.description: Add 10 missing scenario types to write_header(): micro_stop, contextual_anomaly, intermittent_fault (Phase 4) + batch_cycle, oven_thermal_excursion, fill_weight_drift, seal_integrity_failure, chiller_door_alarm, cip_cycle, cold_chain_break (F&B). Guard F&B scenarios with None checks. Test both profiles produce complete scenario lists.

tasks.name: Dockerfile Hardening
tasks.description: Create .dockerignore (exclude .git, tests, output, plans, prd, __pycache__, caches). Add non-root 'simulator' user to Dockerfile. Change editable install to regular install. Ensure output dir writable by non-root user.

tasks.name: OPC-UA EngineeringUnits Property
tasks.description: Add EngineeringUnits property (EUInformation type) to all OPC-UA variable nodes using signal config units field. Use OPC Foundation UNECE namespace. UnitId=-1. Test: asyncua client browse verifies EngineeringUnits present with correct unit string.

tasks.name: Fix Oven Gateway UID Routing in Realistic Mode
tasks.description: In realistic mode, remap oven gateway secondary slaves to UIDs 1/2/3 (not 11/12/13). Keep collapsed mode UIDs 11/12/13 unchanged. UID 10 stays on primary context for energy. Test: realistic mode read IR 0 at UID 1 on port 5031 returns zone 1 PV. Test collapsed mode unaffected.

tasks.name: Fix Severity Weight Key Mismatch
tasks.description: Normalise ground truth event types (PascalCase) to snake_case before looking up in severity_weights and latency_targets. Helper: re.sub(r'(?<!^)(?=[A-Z])', '_', name).lower(). Test: evaluator with PascalCase GT events + non-default weights produces weighted_recall != unweighted_recall.

tasks.name: Fix Double-Logging of Ground Truth Events
tasks.description: Remove duplicate log_scenario_start/log_scenario_end calls from individual scenarios (bearing_wear, micro_stop, contextual_anomaly, intermittent_fault, batch_cycle, cip_cycle, cold_chain_break). ScenarioEngine is the single source of truth for start/end GT events. Keep scenario-specific detail logging (phase transitions, parameter changes). Test: deterministic sim produces exactly one start + one end per scenario instance.

tasks.name: Handle Open Scenarios in Evaluator
tasks.description: For scenario_start with no matching scenario_end, use simulation end time (last event timestamp) as end time. Add optional 'open' field to GroundTruthEvent. Test: GT file with open BearingWear is included in evaluation, detection within window counts as TP.

tasks.name: Validate All Fixes — Full Suite + Integration Check
tasks.description: Run ruff + mypy + pytest full suite. Run short batch simulation end-to-end. Verify ground truth JSONL produced with events. Verify no regressions. Fix any failures.
